{{pp-protected|small=yes}}{{Navbox |name = Depictions of Muhammad |state = {{{state|collapsed}}} |title = [[Depictions of Muhammad|Depictions]] of [[Muhammad]] |bodyclass = hlist |groupstyle = line-height:1.3em; |group1 = History |list1 = * [[Muhammad in Islam]] * [[Aniconism in Islam]] * [[Hadith]] ** [[List of hadith collections|collections]] * [[Ibn Ishaq]] * [[Ibn Hisham]] * [[Al-Tabari|Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari]] * [[Hilya]] |group2 = Controversies |list2 = {{Navbox|subgroup | list1 = * [[Lars Vilks Muhammad drawings controversy|Lars Vilks drawings]] * [[Everybody Draw Mohammed Day]] * [[The Satanic Verses controversy|''The Satanic Verses'' controversy]] * [[Trial of Ghazi Beji and Jabeur Mejri]] * [[2006 Idomeneo controversy|2006 ''Idomeneo'' controversy]] |group2= [[Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|''Jyllands-Posten''
cartoons]] |list2= * [[Descriptions of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons|Descriptions]] * [[List of newspapers that reprinted Jyllands-Posten's Muhammad cartoons|Reprints]] * [[Opinions on the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Opinions]] * [[Timeline of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Timeline]] * [[Akkari-Laban dossier]] * [[2006 Islamist demonstration outside the Embassy of Denmark in London|Protest outside the Danish embassy in London]] * [[2008 Danish embassy bombing in Islamabad|Bombing of Danish embassy in Islamabad]] |group3= ''[[Charlie Hebdo]]'' |list3= * [[Charlie Hebdo shooting|2015 shooting]] * [[2020 Paris stabbing attack|2020 stabbing attack]] * [[Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1011|Issue No. 1011]] * [[Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1178|Issue No. 1178]] * ''[[Je suis Charlie]]'' }} |group3 = Books |list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup |group1 = [[List of biographies of Muhammad|Biographies
of Muhammad]]
([[:Category:Biographies of Muhammad|Category]]) |list1 = * ''[[Prophetic biography|Sirah Rasul Allah]]'' * ''[[Shama'il Muhammadiyah]]'' * ''[[Sirat-un-Nabi]]'' * [[Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya (Ibn Kathir)|''Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya'' (Ibn Kathir)]] * ''[[Al-Bidaya wa'l-Nihaya]]'' * ''[[Al-Khasais-ul-Kubra]]'' * ''[[Siyer-i Nebi]]'' * ''[[Marzban-nama]]'' * ''[[Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri|Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Biography of the Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Prophet for Our Time]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: His Life Based on the Earliest Sources]]'' * [[Muhammad (book)|''Muhammad'']] * ''[[Muhammad at Mecca]]'' * ''[[Muhammad at Medina]]'' * [[Latin biographies of Muhammad]] |list2 = * ''[[Captain Stormfield's Visit to Heaven]]'' * [[Falnama]] * [[Inferno (Dante)|''Inferno'']] * ''[[Izhar ul-Ha11]]'' * ''[[Mahomet (play)|Mahomet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The "Banned" Images]]'' * ''[[Rangila Rasul]]'' * ''[[Seeing Islam as Others Saw It]]'' * ''[[The 100: A Ranking of the Most Influential Persons in History]]'' * ''[[The Cartoons that Shook the World]]'' * ''[[The Jewel of Medina]]'' * ''[[The Quest for the Historical Muhammad (Ibn Warraq)|The Quest for the Historical Muhammad]]'' * ''[[The Truth About Muhammad]]'' }} |group4 = [[Muhammad in film|Films]]
([[:Category:Films about Muhammad|Category]]) |list4 = * ''[[Muhammad: Legacy of a Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The Last Prophet]]'' * ''[[The Message (1976 film)|The Message]]'' * ''[[Islam: Empire of Faith]]'' * ''[[Innocence of Muslims]]'' * ''[[Islam: What the West Needs to Know]]'' * ''[[Fetih 1453]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The Messenger of God (film)|Muhammad: The Messenger of God]]'' * ''[[Bilal: A New Breed of Hero|Bilal]]'' |group5 = Television |list5 = {{Navbox|subgroup |list1 = * ''[[Muhammad: The Final Legacy]]'' * ''[[The Life of Muhammad]]'' * ''[[Islam: The Untold Story]]'' * ''[[Omar (TV series)|Omar]]'' * ''[[Khaybar (TV series)|Khaybar]]'' |group2 = ''[[South Park]]'' |list2 = * "[[Super Best Friends]]" * "[[Cartoon Wars Part I]]" * "[[Cartoon Wars Part II]]" * "[[200 (South Park)|200]]" * "[[201 (South Park)|201]]" }} |group6 = Video games |list6 = * [[Quraish (video game)|''Quraish'']] * ''[[Muslim Massacre (video game)|Muslim Massacre]]'' * ''[[Faith Fighter]]'' |below = *{{Icon|category}} [[:Category:Cultural depictions of Muhammad|Category]] *{{Icon|commons}} [[Commons:Category:Depictions of Muhammad|Commons]] *{{Portal-inline | Islam}} }} {{Documentation}} {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Muhammad templates]] }}

{{pp-protected|small=yes}}{{Navbox |name = Depictions of Muhammad |state = {{{state|collapsed}}} |title = [[Depictions of Muhammad|Depictions]] of [[Muhammad]] |bodyclass = hlist |groupstyle = line-height:1.3em; |group1 = History |list1 = * [[Muhammad in Islam]] * [[Aniconism in Islam]] * [[Hadith]] ** [[List of hadith collections|collections]] * [[Ibn Ishaq]] * [[Ibn Hisham]] * [[Al-Tabari|Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari]] * [[Hilya]] |group2 = Controversies |list2 = {{Navbox|subgroup | list1 = * [[Lars Vilks Muhammad drawings controversy|Lars Vilks drawings]] * [[Everybody Draw Mohammed Day]] * [[The Satanic Verses controversy|''The Satanic Verses'' controversy]] * [[Trial of Ghazi Beji and Jabeur Mejri]] * [[2006 Idomeneo controversy|2006 ''Idomeneo'' controversy]] |group2= [[Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|''Jyllands-Posten''
cartoons]] |list2= * [[Descriptions of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons|Descriptions]] * [[List of newspapers that reprinted Jyllands-Posten's Muhammad cartoons|Reprints]] * [[Opinions on the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Opinions]] * [[Timeline of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Timeline]] * [[Akkari-Laban dossier]] * [[2006 Islamist demonstration outside the Embassy of Denmark in London|Protest outside the Danish embassy in London]] * [[2008 Danish embassy bombing in Islamabad|Bombing of Danish embassy in Islamabad]] |group3= ''[[Charlie Hebdo]]'' |list3= * [[Charlie Hebdo shooting|2015 shooting]] * [[2020 Paris stabbing attack|2020 stabbing attack]] * [[Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1011|Issue No. 1011]] * [[Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1178|Issue No. 1178]] * ''[[Je suis Charlie]]'' }} |group3 = Books |list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup |group1 = [[List of biographies of Muhammad|Biographies
of Muhammad]]
([[:Category:Biographies of Muhammad|Category]]) |list1 = * ''[[Prophetic biography|Sirah Rasul Allah]]'' * ''[[Shama'il Muhammadiyah]]'' * ''[[Sirat-un-Nabi]]'' * [[Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya (Ibn Kathir)|''Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya'' (Ibn Kathir)]] * ''[[Al-Bidaya wa'l-Nihaya]]'' * ''[[Al-Khasais-ul-Kubra]]'' * ''[[Siyer-i Nebi]]'' * ''[[Marzban-nama]]'' * ''[[Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri|Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Biography of the Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Prophet for Our Time]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: His Life Based on the Earliest Sources]]'' * [[Muhammad (book)|''Muhammad'']] * ''[[Muhammad at Mecca]]'' * ''[[Muhammad at Medina]]'' * [[Latin biographies of Muhammad]] |list2 = * ''[[Captain Stormfield's Visit to Heaven]]'' * [[Falnama]] * [[Inferno (Dante)|''Inferno'']] * ''[[Izhar ul-Ha11]]'' * ''[[Mahomet (play)|Mahomet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The "Banned" Images]]'' * ''[[Rangila Rasul]]'' * ''[[Seeing Islam as Others Saw It]]'' * ''[[The 100: A Ranking of the Most Influential Persons in History]]'' * ''[[The Cartoons that Shook the World]]'' * ''[[The Jewel of Medina]]'' * ''[[The Quest for the Historical Muhammad (Ibn Warraq)|The Quest for the Historical Muhammad]]'' * ''[[The Truth About Muhammad]]'' }} |group4 = [[Muhammad in film|Films]]
([[:Category:Films about Muhammad|Category]]) |list4 = * ''[[Muhammad: Legacy of a Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The Last Prophet]]'' * ''[[The Message (1976 film)|The Message]]'' * ''[[Islam: Empire of Faith]]'' * ''[[Innocence of Muslims]]'' * ''[[Islam: What the West Needs to Know]]'' * ''[[Fetih 1453]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The Messenger of God (film)|Muhammad: The Messenger of God]]'' * ''[[Bilal: A New Breed of Hero|Bilal]]'' |group5 = Television |list5 = {{Navbox|subgroup |list1 = * ''[[Muhammad: The Final Legacy]]'' * ''[[The Life of Muhammad]]'' * ''[[Islam: The Untold Story]]'' * ''[[Omar (TV series)|Omar]]'' * ''[[Khaybar (TV series)|Khaybar]]'' |group2 = ''[[South Park]]'' |list2 = * "[[Super Best Friends]]" * "[[Cartoon Wars Part I]]" * "[[Cartoon Wars Part II]]" * "[[200 (South Park)|200]]" * "[[201 (South Park)|201]]" }} |group6 = Video games |list6 = * [[Quraish (video game)|''Quraish'']] * ''[[Muslim Massacre (video game)|Muslim Massacre]]'' * ''[[Faith Fighter]]'' |below = *{{Icon|category}} [[:Category:Cultural depictions of Muhammad|Category]] *{{Icon|commons}} [[Commons:Category:Depictions of Muhammad|Commons]] *{{Portal-inline | Islam}} }} {{Documentation}} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Muhammad templates]] }} \n

cartoons]] |list2= * [[:en:Descriptions of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons|Descriptions]] * [[List of newspapers that reprinted Jyllands-Posten's Muhammad cartoons|Reprints]] * [[Opinions on the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Opinions]] * [[Timeline of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Timeline]] * [[:en:Akkari-Laban dossier|Akkari-Laban dossier]] * [[:en:2006 Islamist demonstration outside the Embassy of Denmark in London|Protest outside the Danish embassy in London]] * [[:en:2008 Danish embassy bombing in Islamabad|Bombing of Danish embassy in Islamabad]] |group3= ''[[:en:Charlie Hebdo|Charlie Hebdo]]'' |list3= * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo shooting|2015 shooting]] * [[:en:2020 Paris stabbing attack|2020 stabbing attack]] * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1011|Issue No. 1011]] * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1178|Issue No. 1178]] * ''[[Je suis Charlie]]'' }} |group3 = Books |list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup |group1 = [[List of biographies of Muhammad|Biographies
of Muhammad]]
([[:Category:Biographies of Muhammad|Category]]) |list1 = * ''[[Prophetic biography|Sirah Rasul Allah]]'' * ''[[Shama'il Muhammadiyah]]'' * ''[[Sirat-un-Nabi]]'' * [[:en:Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya (Ibn Kathir)|''Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya'' (Ibn Kathir)]] * ''[[:en:Al-Bidaya wa'l-Nihaya|Al-Bidaya wa'l-Nihaya]]'' * ''[[:en:Al-Khasais-ul-Kubra|Al-Khasais-ul-Kubra]]'' * ''[[Siyer-i Nebi]]'' * ''[[Marzban-nama]]'' * ''[[Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri|Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Biography of the Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Prophet for Our Time]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: His Life Based on the Earliest Sources]]'' * [[Muhammad (book)|''Muhammad'']] * ''[[Muhammad at Mecca]]'' * ''[[Muhammad at Medina]]'' * [[Latin biographies of Muhammad]] |list2 = * ''[[:en:Captain Stormfield's Visit to Heaven|Captain Stormfield's Visit to Heaven]]'' * [[:en:Falnama|Falnama]] * [[Inferno (Dante)|''Inferno'']] * ''[[Izhar ul-Ha11]]'' * ''[[Mahomet (play)|Mahomet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The "Banned" Images]]'' * ''[[Rangila Rasul]]'' * ''[[Seeing Islam as Others Saw It]]'' * ''[[The 100: A Ranking of the Most Influential Persons in History]]'' * ''[[The Cartoons that Shook the World]]'' * ''[[The Jewel of Medina]]'' * ''[[The Quest for the Historical Muhammad (Ibn Warraq)|The Quest for the Historical Muhammad]]'' * ''[[The Truth About Muhammad]]'' }} |group4 = [[Muhammad in film|Films]]

{{pp-protected|small=yes}}{{Navbox |name = Depictions of Muhammad |state = {{{state|collapsed}}} |title = [[:en:Depictions of Muhammad|Depictions]] of [[Muhammad]] |bodyclass = hlist |groupstyle = line-height:1.3em; |group1 = History |list1 = * [[Muhammad in Islam]] * [[:en:Aniconism in Islam|Aniconism in Islam]] * [[:en:Hadith|Hadith]] ** [[List of hadith collections|collections]] * [[:en:Ibn Ishaq|Ibn Ishaq]] * [[:en:Ibn Hisham|Ibn Hisham]] * [[:en:Al-Tabari|Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari]] * [[:en:Hilya|Hilya]] |group2 = Controversies |list2 = {{Navbox|subgroup | list1 = * [[Lars Vilks Muhammad drawings controversy|Lars Vilks drawings]] * [[:en:Everybody Draw Mohammed Day|Everybody Draw Mohammed Day]] * [[The Satanic Verses controversy|''The Satanic Verses'' controversy]] * [[Trial of Ghazi Beji and Jabeur Mejri]] * [[:en:2006 Idomeneo controversy|2006 ''Idomeneo'' controversy]] |group2= [[Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|''Jyllands-Posten''
cartoons]] |list2= * [[:en:Descriptions of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons|Descriptions]] * [[List of newspapers that reprinted Jyllands-Posten's Muhammad cartoons|Reprints]] * [[Opinions on the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Opinions]] * [[Timeline of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Timeline]] * [[:en:Akkari-Laban dossier|Akkari-Laban dossier]] * [[:en:2006 Islamist demonstration outside the Embassy of Denmark in London|Protest outside the Danish embassy in London]] * [[:en:2008 Danish embassy bombing in Islamabad|Bombing of Danish embassy in Islamabad]] |group3= ''[[:en:Charlie Hebdo|Charlie Hebdo]]'' |list3= * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo shooting|2015 shooting]] * [[:en:2020 Paris stabbing attack|2020 stabbing attack]] * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1011|Issue No. 1011]] * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1178|Issue No. 1178]] * ''[[Je suis Charlie]]'' }} |group3 = Books |list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup |group1 = [[List of biographies of Muhammad|Biographies
of Muhammad]]
([[:Category:Biographies of Muhammad|Category]]) |list1 = * ''[[Prophetic biography|Sirah Rasul Allah]]'' * ''[[Shama'il Muhammadiyah]]'' * ''[[Sirat-un-Nabi]]'' * [[:en:Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya (Ibn Kathir)|''Al-Sira Al-Nabawiyya'' (Ibn Kathir)]] * ''[[:en:Al-Bidaya wa'l-Nihaya|Al-Bidaya wa'l-Nihaya]]'' * ''[[:en:Al-Khasais-ul-Kubra|Al-Khasais-ul-Kubra]]'' * ''[[Siyer-i Nebi]]'' * ''[[Marzban-nama]]'' * ''[[Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri|Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Biography of the Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: A Prophet for Our Time]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: His Life Based on the Earliest Sources]]'' * [[Muhammad (book)|''Muhammad'']] * ''[[Muhammad at Mecca]]'' * ''[[Muhammad at Medina]]'' * [[Latin biographies of Muhammad]] |list2 = * ''[[:en:Captain Stormfield's Visit to Heaven|Captain Stormfield's Visit to Heaven]]'' * [[:en:Falnama|Falnama]] * [[:en:Inferno (Dante)|''Inferno'']] * ''[[Izhar ul-Ha11]]'' * ''[[Mahomet (play)|Mahomet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The "Banned" Images]]'' * ''[[Rangila Rasul]]'' * ''[[Seeing Islam as Others Saw It]]'' * ''[[The 100: A Ranking of the Most Influential Persons in History]]'' * ''[[The Cartoons that Shook the World]]'' * ''[[The Jewel of Medina]]'' * ''[[The Quest for the Historical Muhammad (Ibn Warraq)|The Quest for the Historical Muhammad]]'' * ''[[The Truth About Muhammad]]'' }} |group4 = [[Muhammad in film|Films]]
([[:Category:Films about Muhammad|Category]]) |list4 = * ''[[Muhammad: Legacy of a Prophet]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The Last Prophet]]'' * ''[[The Message (1976 film)|The Message]]'' * ''[[Islam: Empire of Faith]]'' * ''[[:en:Innocence of Muslims|Innocence of Muslims]]'' * ''[[Islam: What the West Needs to Know]]'' * ''[[:en:Fetih 1453|Fetih 1453]]'' * ''[[Muhammad: The Messenger of God (film)|Muhammad: The Messenger of God]]'' * ''[[:en:Bilal: A New Breed of Hero|Bilal]]'' |group5 = Television |list5 = {{Navbox|subgroup |list1 = * ''[[Muhammad: The Final Legacy]]'' * ''[[The Life of Muhammad]]'' * ''[[Islam: The Untold Story]]'' * ''[[Omar (TV series)|Omar]]'' * ''[[Khaybar (TV series)|Khaybar]]'' |group2 = ''[[South Park]]'' |list2 = * "[[Super Best Friends]]" * "[[:en:Cartoon Wars Part I|Cartoon Wars Part I]]" * "[[:en:Cartoon Wars Part II|Cartoon Wars Part II]]" * "[[:en:200 (South Park)|200]]" * "[[:en:201 (South Park)|201]]" }} |group6 = Video games |list6 = * [[Quraish (video game)|''Quraish'']] * ''[[Muslim Massacre (video game)|Muslim Massacre]]'' * ''[[:en:Faith Fighter|Faith Fighter]]'' |below = *{{Icon|category}} [[:Category:Cultural depictions of Muhammad|Category]] *{{Icon|commons}} [[Commons:Category:Depictions of Muhammad|Commons]] *{{Portal-inline | Islam}} }} {{Documentation}} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Muhammad templates]] }} \n

cartoons]] |list2= * [[:en:Descriptions of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons|Descriptions]] * [[List of newspapers that reprinted Jyllands-Posten's Muhammad cartoons|Reprints]] * [[Opinions on the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Opinions]] * [[Timeline of the Jyllands-Posten Muhammad cartoons controversy|Timeline]] * [[:en:Akkari-Laban dossier|Akkari-Laban dossier]] * [[:en:2006 Islamist demonstration outside the Embassy of Denmark in London|Protest outside the Danish embassy in London]] * [[:en:2008 Danish embassy bombing in Islamabad|Bombing of Danish embassy in Islamabad]] |group3= ''[[:en:Charlie Hebdo|Charlie Hebdo]]'' |list3= * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo shooting|2015 shooting]] * [[:en:2020 Paris stabbing attack|2020 stabbing attack]] * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1011|Issue No. 1011]] * [[:en:Charlie Hebdo issue No. 1178|Issue No. 1178]] * ''[[:en:Je suis Charlie|Je suis Charlie]]'' }} |group3 = Books |list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup |group1 = [[List of biographies of Muhammad|Biographies
